name: Stifado
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boneless beef chuck - cut into 1-1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the beef with flour.
2. Heat oil in a heavy 4- to 5-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
3. Add beef to the pan in batches and cook until brown, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes per batch. Transfer the browned beef to the bowl.
4. Add onions to the pan and cook until light brown, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes, garlic, herbs, and cumin to the pan.
6. Stir in wine and bring to a boil.
7. Cover and bake in the oven at 350°F until beef is tender, about 2 hours. (The dish can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Rewarm in the oven at 350°F before continuing.)
8. Stir in feta into stew.
9. Return to oven and continue baking until cheese is heated through, about 10 minutes.
10. Season with salt and pepper and serve.
